overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a dark, rocky canyon at night in a video game. The player character walks from a narrow enclosed passage between steep cliffs into an open desolate field scattered with dead trees under a stormy sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliffs on both sides

entered.detail: tall gray rock face forming the canyon wall on the right side
rocky cliff face on the left side of the narrow passage
winding dirt trail through the canyon floor
sparse dry bushes and grass along the canyon edges

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow rocky canyon at night. Steep rock walls flank both sides with a dirt path winding through the center. The sky is partially visible above as dark storm clouds, and sparse vegetation lines the canyon floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley exit transitioning to open terrain

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into a wider valley with distant tree line visible

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the terrain opens up from the canyon into a broader valley

entered.detail: dark silhouette of trees visible on the horizon beyond the valley exit
loose boulders and rock formations scattered across the grass
gentle slopes visible in the distance under the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up into a wide valley as the camera exits the enclosed passage. The steep rock walls fall away to reveal a broader landscape with distant trees on the horizon. The ground transitions to grassy terrain with scattered rocks, and the full stormy sky becomes visible overhead.

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland approaching a large dead tree while surveying the desolate landscape

entered.detail: massive gnarled dead tree with twisted bare branches silhouetted against the sky
large rock outcrop on the right side of the path
faint orange light on the distant horizon beneath the storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open desolate grassland dotted with dead trees. A large twisted dead tree dominates the left side of the frame, growing larger as the camera approaches. The terrain is uneven with scattered boulders, and a faint glow appears on the distant horizon beneath the dark storm clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic confines of a rocky canyon into a vast, desolate grassland under a stormy night sky. It begins by winding through a narrow passage flanked by steep rock walls and sparse vegetation, with only a sliver of dark clouds visible above. As the camera exits the enclosure, the rock walls fall away and the scene opens into a wide valley where the dirt path transitions into grassy terrain. The camera then moves further into the open expanse, passing scattered boulders and approaching a large, twisted dead tree that dominates the landscape. Finally, the view expands across the uneven grassland toward a faint glow appearing on the distant horizon beneath the heavy storm clouds.
